title: KPI Threshold Levels
description: KPI Threshold Levels determine how ITSI extracts health status information from KPI searches. Threshold levels are user-configured values that can be augmented further using adaptive thresholding.

attributes.name: thresholdValue
attributes.label: thresholdValue
attributes.description: Value for the threshold field stats identifying this threshold level. This is the key value that defines the levels for values derived from the KPI search metrics.

attributes.name: severityColor
attributes.label: severityColor
attributes.description: Severity color assigned for this threshold level.

attributes.name: severityColorLight
attributes.label: severityColorLight
attributes.description: Severity light color assigned for this threshold level.

attributes.name: severityValue
attributes.label: severityValue
attributes.description: Severity value assigned for this threshold level.

attributes.name: severityLabel
attributes.label: severityLabel
attributes.description: Severity label assigned for this threshold level like info, warning, critical, etc.

attributes.name: dynamicParam
attributes.label: dynamicParam
attributes.description: Value of the dynamic parameter for adaptive thresholds.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
